imprint.liabilityBody: The contents of our pages have been created with the greatest care. However, we cannot guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or timeliness of the content.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Body:
[First and last name]
[Street and number]
[Postal code and city]
Email:
privacy.section2Intro: When you use Learnstation, we process the following personal data:
section2Items: <bold>Account data:</bold> email address, password (stored encrypted), full name (optional), avatar URL.
<bold>Learning progress:</bold> completed slides, quiz results, XP, level, streaks, and achievements.
<bold>Learning events:</bold> slide view duration, quiz answers with timestamps, and self-rated understanding.
<bold>Usage data:</bold> browser type (only via Supabase standard logs).
section3Items: <bold>Performance of contract (Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR):</bold> account data and learning progress are required to provide the platform's core functionality.
<bold>Legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR):</bold> learning events are collected to improve teaching and to help instructors identify difficult content.
section4Items: <bold>Supabase Inc.</bold> — authentication, database, and file storage. Data is stored on EU servers (depending on project configuration).
<bold>Ollama (local)</bold> — AI summaries and quiz questions are processed locally on the server. No data is sent to external AI services.
privacy.section5Body: Your data is stored as long as your account is active. After account deletion, all personal data is deleted within 30 days.
privacy.section6Intro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
section6Items: <bold>Right of access (Art. 15):</bold> you can request what data we have stored about you.
<bold>Right to erasure (Art. 17):</bold> you can delete your account and all associated data in the settings.
<bold>Right to data portability (Art. 20):</bold> you can export your data as a JSON file in the settings.
<bold>Right to object (Art. 21):</bold> you may object to the processing of your data at any time.
<bold>Right to lodge a complaint:</bold> you have the right to file a complaint with a data protection authority.
privacy.section7Body: Learnstation does not use <bold>tracking cookies</bold> and no third-party analytics tools (no Google Analytics, no Facebook Pixel). Only the browser's localStorage is used for session management.
privacy.section8Body: Supabase may process data on servers in the United States. In that case, the EU Standard Contractual Clauses (SCCs) apply as a safeguard under Art. 46 GDPR.
